race.comment: ITALUS (4) Wootton Bassett colt from the good producing mare Runaway Jesse on debut for the Angus Stewart yard. Has shown ability in all his trials and looks ready to run a big race with Braith Nock engaged. Respect. TOKE (9) is deep into the preparation and has a fitness edge over the bulk of these. Strode forward from the wide gate and gripped on in the heavy (8) going with an even third over 1262m at Taree. Adept in all conditions and shapes as a top-three player. BONCAPO (2) resumes and is now in the Michael Mulholland yard. Placed first-up over 1400m last time in and ticks a few boxes today. Genuine contender with the lugging bit going on. FORWARDING (3) hard fit for this and desperate to draw a better gate. Worked hard early and knocked up late to finish fourth over 1400m at Mudgee. Has a host of gear changes and place claims look best.
